headline: School IB business management class: How high-end restaurants went global
body_text:
This article picked by a teacher with suggested questions is part of the Financial Times free schools access programme. Details/registration here.

Specification: Introduction to Business Management, Human Resource Management, Finance and Accounts, Marketing, Operations Management

Read the article below and then answer the questions:

How high-end restaurants went global

Teachers can see a fuller worksheet for this resource here.

Paul Hoang, InThinking
